name: synaptic-canvas
description: A marketplace for Claude Code skills

packages.name: sc-ai-cli
packages.description: AI-first CLI design toolkit: create, review, and harden JSON-first CLIs with MCP-ready contract seams, typed error contracts, auditable mutations, repeatable scaffolding patterns, and stateful simulator design guidance.
packages.author: randlee

packages.name: sc-ci-automation
packages.description: Run CI quality gates (pull → build → test) with optional auto-fix and PR creation. Coordinates pull from upstream, builds projects, runs tests, applies straightforward fixes, and creates PRs when all quality gates pass. Supports version bumping with --patch flag.
packages.author: randlee

packages.name: sc-codex
packages.description: Run Codex agents via a Task Tool-compatible runner, with hooks emulation and background execution support.
packages.author: synaptic-canvas

packages.name: sc-coding-agent-hardening
packages.description: Harden coding, QA, and orchestration agent prompts so straightforward defects are fixed instead of being dismissed as minor, pre-existing, non-blocking, or technical debt.
packages.author: randlee

packages.name: sc-commit-push-pr
packages.description: Commit, push, and create PRs for GitHub and Azure DevOps
packages.author: randlee

packages.name: sc-delay-tasks
packages.description: Schedule delayed one-shot or bounded polling actions with minimal heartbeats. Useful for waiting before running checks (e.g., CI status) or polling with stop-on-success.
packages.author: randlee

packages.name: sc-git-worktree
packages.description: Manage git worktrees with optional tracking and protected branch safeguards: create, scan, cleanup, abort, and update worktrees using a standard sibling folder layout with tracking documents. Prevents accidental deletion of protected branches.
packages.author: randlee

packages.name: sc-github-issue
packages.description: GitHub issue lifecycle management with worktree isolation: list, create, update, and fix issues with automated workflows including PR creation. Integrates with sc-git-worktree for safe isolation.
packages.author: randlee

packages.name: sc-kanban
packages.description: Kanban state machine for Synaptic Canvas: backlog → board → done with gate validation, scrubbing, and shared board config (v0.7).
packages.author: randlee

packages.name: sc-launch-term
packages.description: Launch Claude, Codex, and Gemini sessions in supported terminals with platform-aware terminal autodetect and optional tmux session management.
packages.author: randlee

packages.name: sc-launchpad
packages.description: Launch Claude, Codex, or Gemini as a separate background sub-agent runtime, with explicit ATM teammate-mode normalization and roster registration.
packages.author: synaptic-canvas

packages.name: sc-manage
packages.description: Manage Synaptic Canvas Claude packages. List available packages and their install status (local/global), and install or uninstall packages according to policy.
packages.author: synaptic-canvas

packages.name: sc-repomix-nuget
packages.description: Generate AI-optimized NuGet package context using Repomix with NuGet metadata (dependencies, dependents, namespaces, frameworks). Produces a compressed API surface.
packages.author: synaptic-canvas

packages.name: sc-roslyn-diff
packages.description: Semantic diffing for .NET source using roslyn-diff with JSON-first outputs, HTML reports, and git/PR-aware comparisons.
packages.author: randlee

packages.name: sc-rust
packages.description: Rust development toolkit: idiomatic guidelines, service hardening guidance, design pattern enforcement, and specialized agents for architecture, code review, exploration, implementation, and QA. Includes cross-platform portability guidelines for Ubuntu, macOS, and Windows.
packages.author: randlee

packages.name: sc-startup
packages.description: Startup runner for Synaptic Canvas: read startup prompt, sync master checklist, optional PR triage, worktree hygiene, and CI pull, then emit a concise status with next steps. Supports read-only mode.
packages.author: randlee
